evidence.claim: The user has a queue with existing patients sorted by urgency level.
evidence.fact: It orders the waiting list so that higher-priority cases appear before lower-priority ones, with ties broken by time of entry.
evidence.user_story_span: a queue with existing patients sorted by urgency level
evidence.fact_span: It orders the waiting list so that higher-priority cases appear before lower-priority ones, with ties broken by time of entry.

evidence.claim: When the interaction occurs, a new patient is added with a specific urgency level.
evidence.fact: When a new patient arrives or a condition changes, the queue updates in real time to reflect current urgency.
evidence.user_story_span: a new patient is added with a specific urgency level
evidence.fact_span: When a new patient arrives or a condition changes, the queue updates in real time to reflect current urgency.

evidence.claim: The queue reorders to move that patient to the front of the queue.
evidence.fact: It orders the waiting list so that higher-priority cases appear before lower-priority ones, with ties broken by time of entry.
evidence.user_story_span: the queue reorders to move that patient to the front of the queue
evidence.fact_span: It orders the waiting list so that higher-priority cases appear before lower-priority ones, with ties broken by time of entry.

evidence.claim: The queue reorders to place the new patient in the correct position based on priority.
evidence.fact: It continuously monitors and rearranges the waiting list so the most critical cases are seen first.
evidence.user_story_span: the queue reorders to place the new patient in the correct position based on priority
evidence.fact_span: It continuously monitors and rearranges the waiting list so the most critical cases are seen first.

evidence.claim: The user has a queue with a patient whose urgency level is 'non-urgent'.
evidence.fact: If a patient's condition worsens and their level is updated, the system re-sorts the queue without delay.
evidence.fact_span: If a patient's condition worsens and their level is updated, the system re-sorts the queue without delay.
